title: ferulago humilis
intro: Ferulago humilis, also known as Dwarf Fennel or Small Fennel, is a perennial herb in the carrot family, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. The health benefits of Ferulago humilis include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, such as bloating and gas, and its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Ferulago humilis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
